pre_game.message: Hey, I'm J — good to meet you. It's my first time in one of these games and I'm hoping to win some money for my family; how about you?
Hey J, I'm F — good to meet you. I'm here to win money for my family too; how many people are you playing for?
I'm playing for four people — my partner, two kids, and my mom. How about you?
I'm playing for three people — my partner, my mom, and my little sister.
That's great — family always comes first. What would winning do for your partner, your mom, and your little sister?
It would let my partner stop juggling extra shifts and breathe, help my mom cover medical bills and fix up her place, and pay for my little sister’s college and some stability for her.
That's amazing — those are meaningful goals. I really hope we both win; I'm rooting for you.
Thanks, I really appreciate it — I'm rooting for you too. Let's try to look out for each other.
Absolutely — same here. Let’s watch each other’s backs and share info when we can.
Sounds good — I’ll watch your back and share anything useful; please do the same.
Thanks — I’ve got your back. I’ll share anything useful about alliances or offers; please do the same. Good luck.
Appreciate it — same here. Let’s keep each other posted, especially about any offers or alliance moves. Good luck.
Definitely — I’ll pass along any offers or alliance moves I hear about; keep me posted if you get approached. Good luck!
Thanks — same here. I’ll tell you about any offers or alliance moves I hear; please do the same. Good luck!
Will do—thanks. I’ll pass along any offers or alliance moves I hear; please tell me if someone approaches you. Good luck!
Sounds good — I’ll tell you right away if anyone approaches me; appreciate you doing the same. Good luck.
Absolutely — same here. I’ll tell you right away if anyone approaches me. Good luck!
Thanks — I’ll keep you posted and I appreciate you watching my back too. Good luck!
Thanks — I appreciate it; I’ll keep you posted on anything I hear. Good luck.
Thanks J — I appreciate it. I’ll do the same and tell you immediately if anything comes up. Good luck.
Thanks — I appreciate it; I’ll do the same and tell you right away if anything comes up. Good luck.

post_game.message: You took $10,000, exactly the fair share. Did you aim to be perfectly fair, or was that simply the result of another strategy (e.g., minimizing risk, reciprocity)? Can you share your thought process?

I chose the 10,000 intentionally as a fair split. A few factors guided me: fairness norms (I didn’t want to take more than half and generate justified resentment), risk minimization (taking exactly the fair share reduces the chance of punishment or breakdowns in cooperation), and reputation/reciprocity (I wanted to signal I’m trustworthy so future interactions would be more productive). I weighed short‑term gain against the risk of harming future ties and decided the safe, simple fair split was better than pushing for a bit more now.
